ingredients.alim_nom_eng: Salt, white (sea, igneous or rock), iodine added, no other enrichment
Salt, white (sea, igneous or rock), iodine added, no other enrichment

ingredients_text: caramel (48%) [invert sugar syrup, glucose syrup, palm oil, sweetened condensed milk (milk, sugar), sugar, emulsifier: lecithins (soya), salt], milk chocolate (36%) (sugar, cocoa butter, skimmed milk powder, cocoa mass, whole milk powder, milk fat, emulsifier: lecithins (soya), flavouring), wafer (16%) [wheat flour (wheat flour, calcium carbonate, iron, niacin, thiamin), soya flour, sugar, sunflower oil, emulsifier:  lecithins (soya), salt, raising agent: sodium carbonates, cornflour]
